title: PUE degradation: 1.35 → 1.62 over 48h
summary: Cluster PUE rose from baseline 1.35 to 1.62 over 48 hours. Inlet temperatures increasing across rack rows B and C. CRAC unit 2 reported partial airflow reduction at 22:00 UTC Mar 11.

timeline.event: Inlet temp on node05-node08 starts climbing

notes: CRAC-2 filter may need replacement. Cooling capacity marginal at current load.
